prompt_text:
### Demographics: 44-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 50.6 kg; Height 152.7 cm; BMI 21.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/89 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 246mg/dL; 9 months ago 214mg/dL; 6 months ago 178mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 148mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 51.8kg; 9 months ago 50.2kg; 6 months ago 51.8kg; 3 months ago 48.2kg; current 50.6kg), Height (12 months ago 152.7cm; 9 months ago 152.7cm; 6 months ago 152.7cm; 3 months ago 152.7cm; current 152.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 122mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 91mmHg; 9 months ago 91mmHg; 6 months ago 91mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 89mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 92U/L; 9 months ago 92U/L; 6 months ago 93U/L; 3 months ago 99U/L; current 94U/L), AST (12 months ago 105U/L; 9 months ago 98U/L; 6 months ago 99U/L; 3 months ago 98U/L; current 101U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 110mg/g; 9 months ago 73mg/g; 6 months ago 71mg/g; 3 months ago 60mg/g; current 81mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 72mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 71mg/dL; 3 months ago 71mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 130mg/dL; 9 months ago 114mg/dL; 6 months ago 131mg/dL; 3 months ago 137mg/dL; current 125mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.85 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
